title: Arlong’s Rule Tightens Around Nami
scene: On pages 8–11, the story moves through Arlong Park and Nami’s dangerous position among the fish-men. Usopp arrives ahead of the others and gets pulled into the fear surrounding Arlong’s domain.

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: Well, let's take him to arlong for the time being...!

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: Forgive us, Zoro. I shall pass Arlong word of your gallant bravery to Luffyy.

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: Such an unfortunate person... I'll never forget you, bro...!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Well, that's enough of that. Let's go on shore.

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: Sure.

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: Ah...

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: WHA...

dialogue.speaker: Arlong
dialogue.text: Just what exactly happened to this town...!?

dialogue.speaker: Arlong
dialogue.text: ...T-This is probably,

dialogue.speaker: Cocoyasi villagers
dialogue.text: "Gosa Village" that Arlong supposedly destroyed a couple weeks ago...

dialogue.speaker: Arlong
dialogue.text: What a sight...

dialogue.speaker: Arlong
dialogue.text: All the houses have been thrown upside down...!

dialogue.speaker: Arlong
dialogue.text: ...I've heard that from the moment they're born,

dialogue.speaker: Arlong
dialogue.text: Fishmen are 10 times stronger than humans...!

dialogue.speaker: Arlong
dialogue.text: This is...

dialogue.speaker: Arlong
dialogue.text: The strength of those from the grand line...!

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: And what happens to the towns that oppose arlong...!

dialogue.speaker: Arlong
dialogue.text: Hm? What's wrong, Johnny!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Almost Let'cha get away.

dialogue.speaker: Arlong
dialogue.text: You must be that exited Human's Partner...!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: gyaaaaaa!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Wait!

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: Whew, talk about a close call...

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: May you be safe, Brother usopp!

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: I shall await here for Yosaku and Brother Luffyy.

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: Puhaha hahaha!

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: You think you can catch up to me!?

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: I'm a master when it comes to running away!

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: Catch me if you can!

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: @Sleb: I'm not sure if I'm not going to

dialogue.speaker: Arlong
dialogue.text: I found you, fishman...!

dialogue.speaker: Arlong
dialogue.text: I'll avenge my dad's death!

dialogue.speaker: Arlong
dialogue.text: What!?

summary: This part builds the Arlong Park conflict by showing how Nami’s choices look contradictory from outside while Arlong’s power keeps the island trapped.
